name: pg111_end_only
description: PG111 — firmware-fired temp-restore-only (end-only, no prime). Calls _SPITTING_FRAME PRIME=0.
diff_explanation: Two intentional differences: (1) Round 3 added target_accel=2500 as the PRZ_RUNTIME_STATE default to defuse the ACCEL=0 trap when PG104 hasn't run; baseline emits SET_VELOCITY_LIMIT ACCEL=0 in this state which would freeze motion. (2) Round 2's _SPITTING_FRAME removed two redundant G90 calls between the two park moves (G90 only matters once per state change; repeating it is a no-op). Both are safety-positive cleanups.
